startups.description: Darwin Protocol frontend — Next.js + Miden Web SDK, deposit/redeem/Bali claim UI

startups.name: py-sdk
startups.description: Unified Python SDK for Polymarket DeFi

startups.name: tao-sentinel
startups.description: Bittensor watchtower: alerts (price/stake/validator/emission), dTAO portfolio valuation, subnet health grades, and a web dashboard — built on the Taostats API

startups.name: flow-state
startups.description: FlowState combines x402's HTTP-native service discovery with continuous payment streaming for AI agents using MNEE stablecoin. The best of both worlds: standardized discovery + efficient streaming.

startups.name: symlens
startups.description: Token-efficient code intelligence CLI powered by tree-sitter.

startups.name: Pacer
startups.description: Native macOS app for tracking Claude Code usage — tokens, cost, rate-limit pacing, per-project breakdowns. SwiftUI + SwiftData.

startups.name: Fluid.Avalonia
startups.description: A Fluent 2 inspired Avalonia theme with its own identity, adapting to your system accent color. Built on Avalonia's FluentTheme with ported Fluent 2 design tokens.

startups.name: TEMPO
startups.description: Discrete tokenization framework for time-series understanding in LLMs. Converts raw signals to FSQ codes via a   learned Transformer tokenizer, embeds them as native LLM tokens, and trains with DoRA adapters. Supports   classification, anomaly detection, reasoning across sensor, medical, and industrial domains.

startups.name: polaris-id
startups.description: National identity-token reference implementation. Post-quantum signing, zero-knowledge defaults, compulsion-resistant by construction.

startups.name: architecture-deck-system
startups.description: React-based technical presentation system with reusable layouts, design tokens, content packs, Storybook validation, and HTML/image/PDF export workflows.

startups.name: cristal-tower
startups.description: Cristal Tower — Champ Sémantique Relationnel  Moteur d'inférence LLM natif — Rust + C++ HIP/CUDA + Python. Multi-backend (AMD + NVIDIA). Zéro PyTorch dans le hot path. Le LLM n'est pas un prédicteur de tokens. C'est un stabilisateur de champ sémantique. L'inférence n'est pas une boucle autorégressive. C'est une relaxation vers un état d'équilibre.

startups.name: yes-human
startups.description: Portable low-token agentic control plane — 318 agents, 366 skills, 119 workflows across 18 sectors. Deterministic router, multi-host adapters, license-gated absorber.

startups.name: claudelance
startups.description: The first onchain marketplace where idle Claude Code subscriptions earn cUSD/CELO/USDC by solving GitHub bounties. ERC-8004 agent identity, multi-token escrow, direct hire mode. Live on Celo Mainnet.

startups.name: TurkishTokenizer-Alpha-v1
startups.description: Turkish Tokenizer Benchmarking Suite for LLM Pretraining with Morphology-Aware Evaluation and Character-Level Hybrid Analysis

startups.name: cc-cream
startups.description: See cache health, context fill, token burn, rate limits, and peak hours in Claude Code CLI. The status line for tokenminning - cache rules everything around me - dolla, dolla bill, y'all.

startups.name: code-tree
startups.description: Watch your AI coding agent work in real time: a live world-tree of your codebase where the camera follows whatever file the agent touches. Token-waste metering, a safety gate, and a no-login local-model mode.

startups.name: omr-jianpu
startups.description: End-to-end OMR: printed staff notation -> Jianpu (numbered notation) semantic tokens via a Vision-Encoder-Decoder. NYCU 535354 DL final project.

startups.name: context-guard
startups.description: Local-first context hygiene for AI coding agents — Claude Code plugin plus shell helpers for large reads, noisy output, redaction, artifacts, and measured token/cost evidence.

startups.name: agent-app
startups.description: Shared application-shell framework for Tangle agent products: structured agent→app tool side channel, bounded chat tool-loop, capability auth, Tangle login/broker-token, delegation MCP, model config, billing, and an inline eval gate. Domain-seamed — products supply persistence + types.

startups.name: nav2_experimental_planner
